---
title: Background Repeat
banner:
  content: Yumma CSS v3 is finally live 🎉
description: Controls the repetition of the background image of an element.
slug: docs/background-repeat
---

<Class name="background-repeat" />

## No Repeat

This example sets the background repeat to **no-repeat**. The background image will not be repeated.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-nr" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-nr bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Repeat

This example sets the background repeat to **repeat**. The background image will be repeated both horizontally and vertically.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-r" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-r bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Round

This example sets the background repeat to **round**. The background image will be repeated and resized to fit the area.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-ro" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-ro bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Repeat X

This example sets the background repeat to **repeat-x**. The background image will be repeated horizontally only.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-rx" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-rx bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Repeat Y

This example sets the background repeat to **repeat-y**. The background image will be repeated vertically only.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-ry" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-ry bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Space

The background image will repeat, leaving space between each image.

{/* prettier-ignore */}
```html live "br-s" layout="/src/layouts/inline.astro"
<div class="br-s bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

## Conditional styles

<Modifier
  utility="br-r"
  prefixUtil="br"
  modifiers={{
    hoverMod: "br-nr",
    responsiveMod: "br-nr",
  }}
/>
